description: Weekly grouped bumps gated by the determinism suite: if a dep changes one output byte, golden corpora fail CI and Renovate won't merge. The bun manager refreshes bun.lock in the same PR automatically, keeping the lockfile fresh (the stale-lockfile publish class).

packageRules.description: One weekly PR for everything non-major. automerge WITHOUT platformAutomerge: Renovate's own automerge waits for all status checks (tests + tarball smoke + e2e) to pass before merging, so the determinism suite is a real gate without needing branch protection. (platformAutomerge would delegate to GitHub auto-merge, which only enforces CI if branch protection requires it.)
Majors stay individual PRs for a human look.
